Natalie & Jordi

Healdsburg,
California

October
15–18, 2026

Weekend info and accommodations

We are so, so excited to welcome you to this weekend celebration! The weekend will be spent glamping at Wildhaven Sonoma in beautiful Healdsburg, California. Here's what that means: real beds and linens provided, electricity, shared bathrooms 30-60 seconds away from the accommodations, it will probably be loud if you're not up late dancing (but ear plugs will be provided!).

If this isn't your vibe (looking at you, Rob), we will be 10 mins away from central Healdsburg, where there are plenty of hotel options and rentals. Check out Montage Healdsburg, Appellation Healdsburg, an SLH Hotel (Hilton), The Lodge at Healdsburg (Hilton), Bella Luna Inn, or Hotel Healdsburg.

More info about staying onsite:

We have 47 accommodations (mostly tents), so plenty of room for folks to stay onsite. There is a mix of 1 to several beds in each accomodation. We are so grateful that people are travelling to celebrate with us and also know it's a big ask, so we wanted to lessen the burden by covering half of the onsite accommodation costs. If you're staying on site, the cost for the weekend will be $250 per person. Also, we'll be feeding you all weekend! We will be there Thursday - Sunday, please arrive whenever it works for you! Instead of dealing with Wildhaven directly, please Venmo Natalie at @Natali-Dunn (yes, there's no "e" for some reason) after you RSVP.

Schedule

We plan to be hanging at the camp most of the weekend! If you're not staying onsite, you are welcome to hang there as much as you'd like.

Thursday
  • Check in starts at 5PM
  • Dinner, fire pits, relax
Friday
  • Spend the day on site, playing games, hiking, sauna
Saturday
  • River day
  • Wedding day ♡
  • Dinner and dancing late
Sunday
  • Breakfast, sauna, pack up

Packing List

Healdsburg has a historic average of 77 high and 49 low this time of year

  • Swimsuit(s) — we have private access to the beautiful Russian River! We will also be renting a sauna for the weekend!
  • Friday night outfit: <insert vibe>
  • Saturday night outfit: <insert vibe>

Travel

The site is a 20 minute drive from the Charles M. Schulz–Sonoma County Airport in Santa Rosa and about a 90 minute drive from San Francisco. If you're flying into the Sonoma County Airport, you can take a rideshare to Wildhaven. You won't need a car when you're here, but there is plenty of parking for the weekend if you're driving up!

RSVP

We're so happy to have a small wedding with people we love. Thank you for coming!

We've addressed your invitations to those invited. If you're not sure, let us know. We will have one child at the wedding, and he's Jordi's little brother.

Sorry, no dogs (a sentence Natalie never would have expected to say). Our dog Maeby will come, and this is also her big day, so we want her to have all the attention (and we want Natalie and Jordi to not be stressed about her getting along).
